_fixture_meta.describes: An ETag computed per the PRD-103 recipe (cited by PRD-109): hash input is the canonical JCS encoding of {payload, identity, tenant}. The hash output is cryptographically opaque; the cleartext identity tokens MUST NOT appear anywhere in the emitted ETag string. No request-local timestamps or nonces in the input. Value-shape conforms to PRD-103-R3 (s256:[A-Za-z0-9_-]{22}).
